positive: A central, stylized minimalist illustration of a majestic roaring lion's head, composed using clean linework and bold, graphic shapes. The style is a fusion of Art Deco geometry and modern screen-print aesthetics, featuring strong black silhouettes against a deep, ethereal twilight blue and vibrant gold accent color palette. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and adaptable for apparel printing, suitable for a high-contrast center graphic. Focus on powerful negative space and graphic impact. Flat illustration, vector art look, symmetrical design, golden ratio composition, clean lines, highly detailed, commercial print art.
